arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has been linked with a big-money move to Saudi Arabia once again, while the threat of Real Madrid continues to loom large for Liverpool as they try to keep Trent Alexander-Arnold

arts.ttl: Why is Brentford vs Liverpool not on TV in UK? How to watch Premier League match

arts.ttl: Arne Slot sends Harvey Elliott message amid Liverpool transfer rumours
arts.sum: Arne Slot has refused to be drawn on speculation linking Harvey Elliott with a move away from Liverpool but admitted the midfielder has made his frustrations known at a lack of game-time

arts.ttl: Liverpool have five Khivcha Kvaratskhelia alternatives as PSG complete Kylian Mbappe replacement mission
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain announce the signing of Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on a long-term contract from Napoli, as Liverpool concede defeat in the race for the Georgian.

arts.ttl: Liverpool have not got best out of Darwin Núñez, admits Arne Slot
arts.sum: Uruguay striker has scored just four goals this season ‘Unfortunately for him, most teams sit back against us’ Arne Slot has admitted Liverpool have struggled to utilise Darwin Núñez’s strengths this season because of problems they encounter against deep-lying defences. The Uruguay international, Liverpool’s record signing at £85m, has scored four goals and started only 14 of Slot’s 31 matches. Núñez missed Tuesday’s draw at Nottingham Forest through suspension but could feature at Brentford on Saturday with Diogo Jota an injury doubt again. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot explains situation with Liverpool star who 'should not be happy'
arts.sum: Harvey Elliott has yet to start a Premier League game this season in a frustrating campaign so far which has been disrupted by injury which has even led to speculation about future
